title: Run Ledger Row
description: One append-only row in <project>/.harness/runs.jsonl (the harness black box). When no project root is detected the row is appended to ~/.claude/state/run-ledger.jsonl instead. Joins what the harness already computed but threw away: execution_fingerprint (run-fingerprint.js, previously stdout-only), spec_hash + sentinel (approval proof), gate decision, git context, and which skills/agents/hooks/mcp-tools ran. Written by *-sdk ledger.append / gate.check tail. Cross-run auditable + portable with the repo + handoff-ready. Required fields are minimal so a Bash SDK can write a row; additionalProperties:true so subsystems can extend.

run_id.description: Stable id for this run (release tag, phase id, or generated)

git_dirty.description: true if working tree had uncommitted changes

spec_hash.description: sha256:<64hex> or null when prompt-only (no workflow-spec)

evidence_refs.description: Pointers back to .appsec/.qa/.uiux detailed evidence (this ledger does not duplicate it)

human_approvals.description: Approval text / sentinel refs / spec_hash sign-offs

gate_result.description: Path to the gate-result/decision file consumed

decision.description: Mirrors gate-decision vocabulary; RECORDED = a non-gate run row (no release verdict)

budget_variance.description: Populated by budget reconciliation (Wave 2): estimate vs actual tokens/time/cost

rollback_ref.description: Backup dir / commit to roll back to
